takes.world shares mostly decline with south k: Global economic weakness weighs on oil demand, reinforcing downward pressure on prices.
takes.middle east bond spreads hit 2022 high a: Middle East bond stress signals heightened risk, but oversupply limits oil's upside.
takes.iran us skirmishes worsen as hormuz ship: Hormuz shipping slowdown adds war premium, but supply glut prevents significant price spike.
takes.us expands strikes into northern iran an: US strikes escalate tensions, supporting prices, but oversupply keeps Brent from rising.
takes.iran war live trump launches hellfire mi: Direct US-Iran conflict in Hormuz raises war premium, but glut caps price impact.
